docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEMETRIS, DANIEL SERVED FEB-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY, MARY
